—
ℹ️
Off-chain PHP Escrow
This deal uses PHP (peso) escrow — it is held off-chain inside GARANSI and does not create any Stellar / Soroban blockchain transaction.

Only XLM deals that go through the Soroban simulation will have TX hashes searchable on Stellar Expert.
Deal ID (GARANSI internal)
—
🔒 Escrow Lock TX
Loading…
View on Stellar Expert
👤 Source Wallet (Client)
Loading…
View on Stellar Expert
👤 Destination Wallet (Freelancer)
Loading…
View on Stellar Expert
💰 Escrowed Amount
Loading…
ℹ️
The Lock TX records the actual escrowed amount (shown above) on Stellar Mainnet — visible on stellar.expert. The Release TX is a separate on-chain transfer that moves the full escrowed XLM to the freelancer's wallet. Both are tamper-proof timestamped proofs permanently recorded on the blockchain.

Your Passport Powers
Every verified transaction builds your on-chain credit history. In the future, use your GaranZ passport to:
Access micro-loans via Stellar lending protocols
Skip verification on partner platforms
Prove track record to international clients
Get lower protocol fees with higher reputation

Export to Freighter
Reveal your GaranZ wallet secret key
⚠️
Huwag ibahagi ang secret key sa kahit sino. Ang sinumang may hawak nito ay may buong kontrol sa iyong wallet.
Ilagay ang iyong account password para magpatuloy:
Iyong GaranZ Wallet Secret Key:
Para i-import sa Freighter:
1. Buksan ang Freighter app/extension
2. Click "Import Account"
3. Piliin ang "Import via Secret Key"
4. I-paste ang secret key sa itaas
🔒
Lock Escrow on Stellar
Records a SOROBAN:LOCK transaction on Stellar Mainnet — searchable on stellar.expert.
⚙️ Sends a 0.0000001 XLM self-payment with memo SOROBAN:LOCK:<dealId> to Horizon Mainnet. Creates a real, searchable on-chain record.
🔓
Release XLM Escrow
Transfer 0 XLM from your wallet to the freelancer's Stellar wallet.
📋 Releasing These Milestones
⚡ Soroban escrow simulation — creates a real Stellar Mainnet transaction with a SOROBAN:RELEASE memo. This action cannot be undone.
Discard this release?
You'll need to re-enter your password to release funds again.
